tasks.completion_summary: Phase 4 Yoga layout: new Strata.Layout.Yoga package (YogaLayoutPass maps computed style to a parallel Yoga tree per tech-design 4.1 and computes integer-cell rects), layout property descriptors, grid-as-flex emulation (native Yoga.Net 3.2.3 grid is non-functional - documented v1.1 fallback per plan risk), SpectreProjection layout overload (Grid for display:grid, absolute placement), multi-column dashboard demo. 155 tests green, clean net8.0;net10.0 build, AOT publish smoke passes.

Phase 5 INTERACTIONS (not legacy Behaviors). Task body described the deprecated imperative IBehavior/BehaviorHost/DI-keyed-service design; docs/05-interaction-redesign.md + 04-plan.md §Phase 5 + tech-design/spec/requirements supersession banners + decision log + recent commits all SUPERSEDE it with selector-bound IObservable<HostEvent>. Implemented the redesigned scope (push-back, goal-driven): new Strata.Interaction package - command: property (additive cascade, CSS-deviation documented), HostEvent records, IInputSource (Subject-backed), ICommandRegistry (single-reg-per-name, replaces DI keyed services), InteractionHost subscription-diff dispatcher (identity stable across re-cascade, detach-before-reattach), sample handlers (navigate/kill-confirm/sparkline). Additive merge via GetMatchedRules, no core cascade change. 183 tests green (+28), clean net8.0;net10.0 Release build, AOT analyzers clean (0 warnings, warnings-as-errors).
tasks.notes: RECOMMEND: update Dart task 4SrLff53j5D6 title/body from 'Phase 5 — Behaviors' to 'Phase 5 — Interactions'; the body is stale (created 2026-05-13, before the 2026-05-16 redesign).

tasks.completion_summary: Phase 6 Focus + Selection + Interactive entry (re-scoped; built on the Phase 5 Strata.Interaction package, no core/dispatcher rebuild). Added: IPseudoStateMutable (runtime pseudo-state toggle contract, since ITreeNode.PseudoStates is read-only by design); FocusController (owns focus ring + index, j/k/arrow nav clamped-not-wrapped, toggles :focused, emits TreeChange.PseudoStateChanged - redesign Q2); SelectionController (multi-node :selected toggle, emits PseudoStateChanged); KeyBindingMap (key->command map, conflicting binding logs+throws - the Phase 6 'error+log' risk); InteractiveSession (Format-Styled -Interactive entry point: programmatic IInputSource -> InteractionHost dispatcher -> full Cascade.Compute re-cascade loop, since Cascade.Update defers tree-change incremental updates to a later phase per its own NotImplementedException; raises Recascaded). SampleCommands.RegisterNavigation gained a FocusController overload. Re-cascade verified by matched-rule growth on the focused node. Real terminal raw-mode input deferred to Phase 7 (documented in InteractiveSession). 53 Interaction tests green (+25), full solution 208 tests green, clean net8.0;net10.0 Release build, AOT/trim analyzers clean (0 warnings, warnings-as-errors).
tasks.notes: No spec conflict found: re-scoped task aligns with docs/05-interaction-redesign.md (FocusController endorsed in Open-question Q2; pseudo-states stay attribute-style toggles per line 41). Design note: ITreeNode.PseudoStates is read-only ('toggled by adapters at runtime'), so controllers drive an IPseudoStateMutable contract + emit the existing TreeChange.PseudoStateChanged record; no Strata.Core change. Entry-point uses full Cascade.Compute for re-cascade because Cascade.Update throws NotImplementedException for any tree change (deferred to a later phase).
